creator: Solger2005@yandex.ru
text:
I need to install postfix-2.5.1 with vda patch ( I click on vda in menu of config) but it can not found on ftp servers such as Freebsd this patch : postfix-2.5.1-vda-ng.patch.gz. How i can do it?

How-To-Repeat: I need to install postfix-2.5.1 with vda patch ( I click on vda in menu of config) but it can not found on ftp servers such as Freebsd this patch : postfix-2.5.1-vda-ng.patch.gz. How i can do it?
